content: shadcn/ui CommandDialog search modal pattern uses CommandGroup with heading prop to create grouped sections (e.g., heading='Machines', heading='Projects'). CommandSeparator between groups. CommandEmpty for no-results. The composition is: CommandDialog > Command > CommandInput + CommandList > CommandEmpty + CommandGroup > CommandItem. Filter-as-you-type is built in to CommandInput — no submit needed. Each CommandItem needs an onSelect handler for navigation (useRouter().push). For search modal triggered by button (not Cmd+K), use Dialog open state controlled by parent button click.
